name: HIVEMIND

abilities.name: We Are Legion
abilities.text: When this model would have an enemy gain a Parasite token but it cannot because the enemy already has one, the enemy is dealt 1 damage.

abilities.name: A New Host
abilities.text: After this model is dealt damage by, or deals damage to, an enemy model as a result of an opposed duel, this model may drain a (t) to have the enemy gain a Parasite token.

actions.name: Exoskeletal Link
actions.effects: This action may target friendly models. If the target has a Parasite token, increase this action's Skl by +2. Place this model in base contact with the target. Then, place the target in base contact with an ally within 6" of it.

extraction_notes: Token 'Parasite' is referenced multiple times but its definition is not provided on this crew card.
